instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent reverse gear engagement at high vehicle speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject reverse gear request when vehicle speed exceeds configured limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park gear engagement while the vehicle is moving.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject park gear request when vehicle speed is above threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall require brake pedal input before drive engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall verify brake pedal state before allowing drive gear.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement during system faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall block gear change when system fault is active.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when engine state is invalid.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject gear engagement if engine state is not running.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent simultaneous conflicting gear states.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect conflicting gear requests.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement during unsafe vehicle conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall block gear engagement when safety condition is not satisfied.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor safety interlock activity.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall record diagnostics when safety interlock blocks a gear request.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect safety interlock logic faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect failure of safety interlock mechanism.

L4_requirements: IF Safety_Interlock_Error = TRUE THEN Safety_Interlock_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall periodically update safety interlock configuration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall refresh safety interlock parameters at configured interval.
